positive: A majestic, stylized depiction of a golden retriever silhouette leaping through a field of glowing, luminous lavender flowers. The style is graphic, minimalist vector art with intricate linework and vibrant solid color blocking. The background features a subtle, stylized watercolor wash gradient of turquoise and sage green, providing high contrast to the golden subject. Perfect for a central, repeatable apparel pattern or print. Clean edges, bold lines, high contrast, elegant composition, symmetry, volumetric lighting.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, lowres, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, illegible, busy background, photo, realism, grainy, dirty
